# SPEC-DUMMY-PASS-001: Test Fixture — PASS case

## 1. Overview

This is a test fixture SPEC that passes all plan-auditor must-pass criteria.

## 2. Requirements (EARS)

### REQ-DPP-001 (Ubiquitous)

The system shall provide a valid test fixture for audit gate unit tests.

### REQ-DPP-002 (Event-driven)

When the audit gate is invoked against this SPEC, it shall return a PASS verdict.

## 3. Scope

### 3.1 In Scope

- Providing a valid SPEC fixture for testing
- Demonstrating all must-pass criteria

### 3.2 Out of Scope

- Any actual implementation
